candidates.target: OpenMP load imbalance and barrier wait in imbalanced parallel for loop
candidates.rationale: Periodic heavy iterations cause some threads to finish later, increasing barrier wait time; using a more dynamic schedule reduces idle time without changing algorithm or data dependencies.
candidates.action_sketch: Replace schedule(runtime) with an explicit dynamic or guided schedule (and optionally nowait if no subsequent dependence) to improve load balance: e.g., '#pragma omp parallel for reduction(+:sum) schedule(guided,chunk)' or 'schedule(dynamic,chunk)'. Optionally set OMP_SCHEDULE at runtime for quick rollback/experimentation.
preconditions: OpenMP enabled; loop iterations are independent aside from the reduction on sum
correctness_checks: Compare CHECKSUM for fixed n,skew across schedules and thread counts
Verify no data races (sum is reduction, work() has no shared state)
rollback_criteria: Runtime regresses >5% at target thread count
